title: Detect and Prevent Slot Overlaps
description: The system shall automatically detect when a new or modified slot overlaps with existing slots and prevent the action, displaying an error message indicating the overlap.
rationale: To ensure efficient resource allocation without conflicts, preventing slot overlaps is essential to maintain proper scheduling and avoid wasteful gaps.
business_value: Efficient scheduling leads to better utilization of resources, reduced downtime, and increased productivity.

source.description: As a scheduler I need to detect and prevent slot overlaps and gap violations so that resources are scheduled efficiently without conflicts or wasteful gaps.

acceptance_criteria: Given a schedule with existing slots
When a user attempts to create or modify a slot that overlaps with an existing slot
Then the system rejects the action and displays an error message indicating the overlap
preconditions: A valid schedule with existing slots is available in the system
postconditions: The attempt to create or modify a slot that overlaps with an existing slot is rejected
An error message indicating the overlap is displayed
functional_constraints: Overlaps are detected and prevented during slot creation or modification
Error messages are clearly and concisely communicated to the user
edge_cases: What happens when a slot is created at the exact same time as an existing slot?
How should the system handle overlapping slots that span multiple days?
What if a user attempts to create a slot that starts after an existing slot ends but before another slot begins?

interfaces.name: Schedule Database
interfaces.description: The system interacts with the Schedule Database to retrieve and update slot information.

interfaces.name: Scheduler Interface
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with the Scheduler Interface to prevent invalid slot creation or modification and display error messages.

test_cases.description: Create a new slot that overlaps with an existing slot.
test_cases.expected_result: The system rejects the action and displays an error message indicating the overlap.

test_cases.description: Modify an existing slot to create an overlap with another slot.
test_cases.expected_result: The system rejects the modification and displays an error message indicating the overlap.

test_cases.description: Create a new slot that starts after an existing slot ends but before another slot begins.
test_cases.expected_result: The system allows the creation of the slot without any issues.
